---
title: "07 Evaluation And Observability"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Main Question

How do we continuously evaluate and improve AI systems?

## Runnable Example

```bash
uv run python localize.py --config configs/localization.yaml --scenario gps_drift
uv run mlflow ui --backend-store-uri sqlite:///mlflow.db --default-artifact-root ./mlruns
```

## Engineering Focus

MLflow logs the system memory: configuration, scenario metadata, metrics, plots, CSV artifacts, and reports. The important question is not only whether a run succeeded, but how it behaved.

## Exercise

Run the baseline and `gps_drift` scenarios with MLflow enabled. Compare trajectory RMSE, final drift, and error plots.
